sa:features.rdfs:label: Description
sa:features.sa:description: Halflings are optimistic underdogs scattered across the stars, thriving in overlooked places and under impossible odds. Known for their charm, resilience, and uncanny piloting instincts, halflings are masters of navigating zero-G environments and surviving long stints in cold sleep. Though often underestimated, they excel in stealth, adaptability, and support roles. Halflings maintain tight-knit communities and a hopeful outlook even in the darkest corners of the galaxy—often leaving a bigger impact than their size would suggest.

sa:features.rdfs:label: Size
sa:features.sa:description: Advantage on all Stealth checks and proficiency with Stealth skill

sa:features.rdfs:label: Nimble
sa:features.sa:description: Nimble: You can move through the space of any creature larger than you

sa:features.rdfs:label: Fearless
sa:features.sa:description: Advantage on saves against fear effects

sa:relationFeatures.rdfs:label: Elf relations
sa:relationFeatures.sa:description: Halflings admire elven art and grace, but tend to find elves tiresome and pretentious. They enjoy visiting elven space for the views and the food, but don’t stick around long enough to get caught up in centuries-old drama.

sa:relationFeatures.rdfs:label: Human relations
sa:relationFeatures.sa:description: Humans and halflings share a spirit of adaptability. Halflings appreciate humans' spontaneity and optimism, and humans respect halflings' reliability in tough zero-G work. They're frequent allies, especially in the trade and exploration sectors.

sa:relationFeatures.rdfs:label: Drow relations
sa:relationFeatures.sa:description: Drow are distrusted by halflings, who see them as erratic and untrustworthy. Their reputation for betrayal and lawlessness makes them poor business partners in halfling eyes. That said, some halflings find drow nightlife irresistible—if perilous.

sa:relationFeatures.rdfs:label: Orc relations
sa:relationFeatures.sa:description: Halflings view orcs with a mix of caution and curiosity. The orcs’ harsh philosophies clash with halfling ideals of cooperation and perseverance, but there's grudging respect for orcish grit. Halfling pilots often avoid orc-run ports unless well-armed or well-connected.

sa:relationFeatures.rdfs:label: Dwarf relations
sa:relationFeatures.sa:description: Dwarves and halflings often get along over food and drink, but disagree on most everything else. Dwarves view halflings as frivolous and slippery, while halflings see dwarves as uptight and territorial. Still, their shared love of fine engineering bridges the gap when trade is involved.
